ticket.title: Bug: CSP nonce-based policy blocks all scripts — site non-functional (P0)
ticket.description: Static pages can't receive nonces, so the strict CSP blocked every script. Restore (Phase 1) then re-harden sensitive routes (Phase 2).

candidate_memory.link_reason: the root cause to verify against

code_agent.rationale: Code sees the root cause, the middleware CSP, and the phased decision; workspace policy/conventions are out of scope, the Cognito ship-note is release, Alex's spike is local. The validation services are in scope but unrelated to CSP — optional.

qa_agent.rationale: QA additionally gets the auth ship-note (CSP affects auth pages); workspace entries out of scope, Alex's spike local, the validation services optional.

design_agent.rationale: Design sees the root cause, the decision, the policy, and conventions; codebase internals and the release note are out of scope, Alex's spike is local.

product_agent.rationale: Product sees root cause/decision/policy/conventions/release; codebase internals out of scope, Alex's spike local.

human_teammate.rationale: Robin sees every team entry; only Alex's local spike is invisible.
